acquisition method: data-dependent product ion mode was selected for all analyses.
alkylation reagent: protein alkylation was performed with 20 mM iodoacetamide at 37°C for 30 min in darkness.
alkylation concentration: alkylation was performed with 20 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: the first step, trypsin at an enzyme:substrate ratio of 1:40 (w/w) was added
fractionation method: high-pH fractionation was conducted for some time points in the experiment
fragmentation method: fragment via high-energy collision dissociation (HCD) activation.
instrument: an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer was used for ion detection.
labeling: stable isotope labeling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
reduction reagent: reduction of protein disulfide bonds was performed with 3 mM Tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP)
reduction concentration: reduction of protein disulfide bonds was performed with 3 mM Tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP)
